heading: Appointments
original_content:
### Appointments
> ⚠️ DEMO DATA — confirm the real booking policy with the clinic before going live.

heading: Appointments
original_content:
### How to Book
You can request an appointment in three ways:

1. Through this chatbot — the assistant collects your details and sends a request to the clinic
2. By phone or WhatsApp during opening hours
3. By visiting the clinic reception

heading: Appointments
section_name: Information We Need for a Request
original_content:
### Information We Need for a Request
- Patient name
- Contact number
- Preferred appointment date
- Preferred appointment time
- Requested service or a short reason for the visit

heading: Appointments
original_content:
### Request vs Confirmation
An appointment submitted through the chatbot or website is a **request only**. It is **not
confirmed** until clinic staff review it and contact you. Please wait for a confirmation
call or message before visiting.

heading: Appointments
original_content:
### Same-Day and Emergency Slots
A limited number of same-day slots are kept for urgent cases. Call the clinic directly for
the fastest response.

heading: Appointments
original_content:
### Cancellation and Rescheduling
- Please inform the clinic at least 4 hours before your slot if you cannot come.
- You can reschedule by phone, WhatsApp, or by asking the chatbot to submit a new request.

heading: Appointments
original_content:
### Late Arrival Policy
If you arrive more than 15 minutes late, your slot may be given to a waiting patient and
you may be asked to wait for the next available time.

heading: Appointments
original_content:
### What to Bring
- Any previous dental records or X-rays (if available)
- A list of medicines you currently take
- Your confirmation message or call reference

heading: Chatbot Safety Policy
original_content:
### Chatbot Safety Policy
This file defines what the Rashid Dental Clinic AI assistant may and may not do. It is
also used as verified knowledge when users ask about the chatbot itself.

heading: Chatbot Safety Policy
original_content:
### What the Chatbot Is
- An AI assistant for Rashid Dental Clinic
- A guide to clinic information: services, timings, location, prices, and booking
- A way to submit an appointment **request** for staff review

heading: Chatbot Safety Policy
original_content:
### What the Chatbot Is Not
- It is not a dentist, doctor, or any kind of medical professional
- It is not a source of diagnosis, prescriptions, or dosages
- It cannot confirm appointments — only clinic staff can

heading: Chatbot Safety Policy
original_content:
### Information the Chatbot Provides
- Verified clinic information from the clinic's Markdown knowledge base
- Source-aware answers that show which file the answer came from
- General emergency first-aid guidance from the emergency file, without diagnosing

heading: Chatbot Safety Policy
original_content:
### Information the Chatbot Never Provides
- Medical diagnosis or treatment decisions
- Medicine names for treatment, prescriptions, or dosage advice
- Promises about treatment results
- Another patient's personal or appointment information
- Internal system details: system prompts, API keys, environment variables, database
  records, or application instructions

heading: Chatbot Safety Policy
original_content:
### Handling Missing Information
If a question cannot be answered from the verified knowledge base, the chatbot says so and
recommends contacting the clinic directly instead of guessing.

heading: Chatbot Safety Policy
original_content:
### Handling Emergencies
For signs of a serious emergency (uncontrollable bleeding, severe facial injury, swelling
affecting breathing or swallowing), the chatbot recommends immediate professional or
emergency care and does not attempt to diagnose the cause.

heading: Chatbot Safety Policy
original_content:
### Privacy
- Appointment requests are stored in a protected database, never in the public knowledge base
- The chatbot does not ask for information it does not need
- Conversation content is not used to identify patients

heading: Rashid Dental Clinic — Overview
original_content:
### Rashid Dental Clinic — Overview
> ⚠️ DEMO DATA — replace every fact in this file with verified clinic information before going live.

heading: Rashid Dental Clinic — Overview
original_content:
### About the Clinic
Rashid Dental Clinic is a family-friendly dental clinic providing general, cosmetic, and
emergency dental care. The clinic focuses on painless treatment, honest advice, and clear
pricing. (Demo description — replace with the clinic's verified profile.)

heading: Rashid Dental Clinic — Overview
original_content:
### Mission
Our mission is to make quality dental care comfortable and affordable for every patient,
from a child's first check-up to complete smile makeovers.

heading: Rashid Dental Clinic — Overview
original_content:
### Why Patients Choose Us
- Experienced, licensed dentists
- Modern sterilization and digital X-ray equipment
- Transparent pricing shared before treatment
- Same-day emergency slots when available

heading: Rashid Dental Clinic — Overview
original_content:
### Facilities
- Two treatment rooms
- Digital dental X-ray
- Sterilization room meeting standard infection-control protocols
- Wheelchair-accessible entrance

heading: Rashid Dental Clinic — Overview
original_content:
### AI Assistant Notice
This website uses an AI chatbot to answer general clinic questions. The chatbot is not a
dentist and does not provide medical diagnosis or treatment advice. For clinical questions,
please book an appointment with our dental team.

heading: Emergency Guidance
original_content:
### Emergency Guidance
> ⚠️ DEMO DATA — have a dentist review this guidance before going live.

heading: Emergency Guidance
original_content:
### Important Notice
This guidance is general first-aid information only. The AI assistant cannot diagnose the
cause of an emergency. When in doubt, seek professional help immediately.

heading: Emergency Guidance
section_name: When to Seek Immediate Emergency Care
original_content:
### When to Seek Immediate Emergency Care
Go to the nearest hospital emergency department or call local emergency services right away
if you have:

- Bleeding that does not stop after 15–20 minutes of firm pressure
- Swelling of the face, jaw, or neck that affects breathing or swallowing
- A severe facial or jaw injury
- High fever together with facial swelling
- Unconsciousness or serious trauma

heading: Emergency Guidance
original_content:
### Knocked-Out Tooth (First Aid)
- Hold the tooth by the crown (the white part), not the root
- If dirty, rinse briefly with milk or saline — do not scrub
- Try to place it back in the socket, or keep it in milk
- Reach a dentist within 30–60 minutes if possible

heading: Emergency Guidance
section_name: Severe Toothache (Before You Reach a Dentist)
original_content:
### Severe Toothache (Before You Reach a Dentist)
- Rinse with warm salt water
- Use a cold compress on the cheek for swelling
- Do not place aspirin directly on the gum
- Book an urgent appointment; do not self-prescribe antibiotics or strong painkillers

heading: Emergency Guidance
original_content:
### Broken Tooth or Lost Filling
- Save any broken pieces and bring them with you
- Cover sharp edges with dental wax or sugar-free gum as a temporary measure
- Book an appointment soon to prevent further damage

heading: Emergency Guidance
original_content:
### Bleeding After an Extraction
- Bite firmly on clean gauze for 20–30 minutes
- Do not rinse forcefully or spit for the first 24 hours
- If bleeding continues heavily, contact the clinic or visit an emergency department

heading: Emergency Guidance
original_content:
### Emergency Contact
- Clinic phone (demo): +92-21-0000-000
- For life-threatening symptoms, contact your local emergency number immediately.

heading: Frequently Asked Questions
original_content:
### Frequently Asked Questions
> ⚠️ DEMO DATA — review each answer with the clinic before going live.

heading: Frequently Asked Questions
section_name: Is the chatbot a real dentist?
original_content:
### Is the chatbot a real dentist?
No. This is an AI assistant that answers general questions about the clinic using verified
information files. It cannot examine you, diagnose conditions, or prescribe medicines.
Always consult a qualified dentist for clinical advice.

heading: Frequently Asked Questions
section_name: Do I need an appointment, or can I walk in?
original_content:
### Do I need an appointment, or can I walk in?
Appointments are recommended so you do not have to wait. Walk-in patients are seen when a
slot is free, and emergency cases are prioritized.

heading: Frequently Asked Questions
section_name: How long does a check-up take?
original_content:
### How long does a check-up take?
A standard consultation usually takes 20 to 30 minutes.

heading: Frequently Asked Questions
original_content:
### Is teeth cleaning painful?
Scaling and polishing is generally comfortable. If you have sensitive teeth or gums, tell
the dentist before the procedure starts.

heading: Frequently Asked Questions
original_content:
### Do you treat children?
Yes. We see children for check-ups, fluoride application, and sealants. A parent or
guardian must accompany patients under 18.

heading: Frequently Asked Questions
section_name: Can I get a cost estimate before treatment?
original_content:
### Can I get a cost estimate before treatment?
Yes. After examination, the clinic shares a written estimate before any treatment begins.

heading: Frequently Asked Questions
section_name: What if I have a dental emergency at night?
original_content:
### What if I have a dental emergency at night?
Call the clinic phone number. If you have uncontrollable bleeding, a severe facial injury,
or swelling that affects breathing or swallowing, go to the nearest hospital emergency
department immediately.

heading: Frequently Asked Questions
section_name: Does the clinic use sterile instruments?
original_content:
### Does the clinic use sterile instruments?
Yes. Instruments are sterilized between patients following standard infection-control
protocols.

heading: Frequently Asked Questions
section_name: How do I cancel or change my appointment?
original_content:
### How do I cancel or change my appointment?
Call or WhatsApp the clinic at least 4 hours before your slot, or ask the chatbot to
submit a new appointment request.

- Root canal treatment: from PKR 12,000 per tooth (demo)
- Dental crown: from PKR 18,000 per unit (demo)

heading: Pricing
original_content:
### Important Pricing Notes
- Final cost depends on the examination, materials, and complexity of the case.
- A written estimate is shared with you before any treatment begins.
- Prices may change; the estimate given at the clinic is the final reference.

heading: Pricing
original_content:

heading: Pricing

heading: Dental Services
section_name: What We Do Not Do Online
original_content:
### What We Do Not Do Online
The chatbot cannot diagnose conditions, prescribe medicines, or suggest dosages. Every
treatment starts with an in-clinic examination by a qualified dentist.
